summary: The control callback (onControl or setControlCallback) does not fire when users drag table points. It only fires when changed() is called manually from script.
Hold Ctrl and scroll the mouse wheel over a table segment to adjust the curve between two points. This works for all table editors in HISE, including envelope displays.
Setting the customColours property to true switches the table to flat-style rendering and enables the standard colourId properties (bgColour, itemColour, etc.) for styling.
Binding multiple TableProcessors to a single ScriptTable (by switching processorId at runtime) can cause a crash on save.
getTableValue expects normalised 0-1 input. Already documented as common mistake.
